bullets: Consistently ranked among top performers in the district — hit and exceeded monthly quotas across smartphones, plans, accessories, device protection, financing, and Verizon Visa card offers.

Promoted to Assistant Manager; mentored and coached a team of 4–8 reps through weekly 1-on-1s, floor coaching, and monthly skill workshops covering objection handling, upselling, and customer retention.
Led store opens/closes, managed inventory, resolved escalated customer issues, and ran daily huddles to align the team on promos and targets.
Built genuine rapport with customers — turned walk-ins into multi-line accounts and walk-outs into long-term brand advocates through consultative, needs-first selling.
